summary: CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal satisfied (lcs_canonical + lcs_errors preserved, new table is STAGING within existing sub-hub), Registry-First (CTB pre-registration at Section 0 before CREATE TABLE), Sovereign ID (no minting, sovereign_id passed through as parameter), No sideways calls (FK validations against outreach.outreach and cl.company_identity are legitimate spine operations, all writes within lcs schema). ENVELOPE: PASS — all 4 fields match (change_type=feature, architectural_flag=false, doctrine_version=2.8.0). SCOPE: PASS — 3 modified paths within migrations/ and tests/. No protected assets touched. EXECUTION: PASS — all 7 acceptance criteria met. movement_emission_intake created as append-only STAGING with triggers + CHECK constraint. movement_type_registry extended with 6 governance columns (allowed_sources, payload_schema, requires_sovereign, requires_outreach, default_retry_strategy, ttl_days). fn_emit_movement validates source/type/fields/payload, computes md5 dedupe_key, inserts idempotently via ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. fn_process_emissions batch-promotes STAGED emissions to cid_intake with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, FK validation, deterministic error logging, status transitions (PROMOTED/REJECTED/ERROR). lcs_emitter role created with EXECUTE-only grant, REVOKE ALL on intake tables. lcs_errors CHECK expanded with emission_validation + emission_processing stages. 16 enforcement tests across 6 categories covering validation paths, deduplication, promotion, error writes, permissions, and status transitions. No scope expansion into workers/dispatch/cadence/UI. OBSERVATIONS: (1) Test fixture real_fk_pair depends on unused outreach_id availability — environment dependency, not code defect. (2) Dispatch integration deferred per WP non_goals — no issue.
